name: timestamp
description: trade timestamp used for chronological split

name: atr_ratio
description: current atr divided by rolling atr mean

name: ema_ratio
description: fast ema divided by slow ema

name: price_position
description: entry close location in rolling range

name: volume_ratio
description: current volume divided by rolling average volume

name: risk_reward_ratio
description: target distance divided by stop distance
